channel.title: AI-skiftet Podcasts
channel.itunes:author: Rolf Skogling
channel.description: English two-host podcast dialogues based on selected AI-skiftet essays.
channel.itunes:summary: English two-host podcast dialogues based on selected AI-skiftet essays.

item.title: The missing consistency condition
item.description: On the contradiction between AI job forecasts, Swedish tech founders' policy wish list and the labour market their own products transform.
